folio.label: 133r
folio.l: But in his herte , ay was the arwe kene
And wel ©e knowe , that of a sursanure
In Surgerie , is ¹ilous the cure
But men mygút touche the arwe , or come ther by
His brother weep~ , and wailed preuyly
Til at the laste , hi~ fel in remembraunce
That whiles he was , at Orleens in fraunce
As ©onge clerkes , that ben likerous
To reden artes , that ben curious
Seken in euäy halke , and euäy herne
Particulere sciences , for to lerne
He hi~ remembred , that vp on a day
At Orliens , in studie , a book he say
Of magyk naturel , whicú his felawe
That was that tyme , a bacheler of lawe
Al were he there , to lerne a nother craft
Hadde preuely , vp on his deske I laft
Whicú book spak muchel , of the o¹aciouns
Touchyngö the xxviijty , mansciouns
That longetú to the Mone , and swicú folie
As in oure dayes , a a is nat wortú a flie424 a: I am not convinced that this letter actually is struck through. Double check /ODR/JRT
For holichirche feitú , in oure byleue
Ne suffretú noon illusiou~ , vs to greue
And whan this book , was in his remembraunce
A noon for ioye , his herte gan to daunce
And to hiö self , he seide priuely
My brother shal be warisshed , hastily
For I am syker , that there be sciences
By whicú men make , dyuerse apparences
Swicú as theise subtile tregetoures , pleye
For ofte atte festes , haue I wel herd seye
That Tregetours , witú Inne an halle large
Han made come in , a water and a barge
And in the halle , rowen vp and doun
Some tyme hatú semed come , a grym leoun
And somtyme floures spénge , as in a Mede
Somtyme a vyne and grapes , white & reede
Somtyme a Castel , al of lyme and ston
And whan hi~ lyked , voided it a noon
Thus semed it , to euäy ma~nes sigút
Now tha~ne conclude I thus , that if I mygút
At Orliens , som olde felawe I fynde
That hadde this mones mansiouns , in mynde
Or other magyk , naturel a boue
He shulde wel make my brother , haue his loue
For witú an apparence , a Clerk may make
